title: Universal addressable element registry — DB-backed, Dashboard-first, full-site sweep
scope:
Replace ad-hoc <PaneHeader> adoption (5 panels, one page) with a single canonical addressable-element substrate that becomes the only blessed way to render a panel, table, or navigation block anywhere in the codebase. Every addressable element is one row in a new page_addressables Postgres table; one Go service (addressables.Service) is the only writer; one runtime registry (DomRegistry) walks the React tree, resolves addresses via AddressContext, and verifies live mounts against the DB.

Addresses follow the form samantha._viewport.<slot>._kind.name[._kind.name…] with leading underscore on every system segment so the address is self-tokenizing. Six closed-vocabulary viewport slots: app | header | footer | side_bar | modal | toast. No _pageID — addresses are page-scoped by where they mount, so custom apps composed via the Samantha SDK are zero-config.

Help bodies move to a new page_help table keyed by the addressable's UUID (not by string paneId), with a sibling library_help_defaults table that auto-seeds new addressables with canonical help copy keyed by (kind, name_pattern). Locale column from day one. Existing pane_help rows are migrated forward then dropped.

Phase A proves the substrate on /dashboard only (highest panel density). Phase B sweeps every other page in risk-ordered clusters. Lint flips to strict-by-default once the last cluster lands.
value:
• Every panel, table, and navigation block in the product becomes a stable, UUID-addressable element — bug reports, chat, screenshots, devtools, accessibility audits, and the help system all reference the same identity.
  • One component to evolve, one service to enforce writes, one lint to police adoption — zero forgotten panels.
  • Custom apps written via Samantha SDK pick up addresses automatically by composition; no manifest registration, no codemod, no per-app config.
  • Help authoring becomes one-to-many on a stable UUID — renames, locale variants, and library-default rollouts work without breaking links.
  • Address devtool (hover any element → copy full address) makes user feedback self-quoting.
implementation_plan: Migration A: page_addressables table (UUID PK, parent self-FK, unique (parent_id, kind, name), source enum, soft_archive, last_seen_at, indexes on address + page_route).
Migration B: page_help (UUID FK to addressable, locale default 'en', body_html, soft_archive) + library_help_defaults (kind + name_pattern + body_html + library_ref).

Backend: addressables.Service (Go) — RegisterFromBuild, RegisterFromRuntime, Snapshot, library-default lookup, hard write boundary (only writer); REST surface POST /api/addressables/build-reconcile + POST /api/addressables/register + GET /api/addressables/snapshot + GET /api/page-help/:addressable_id.

UI substrate: DomRegistryProvider, useRegisterAddressable, AddressContext, <ViewportSlot kind=…>; calls /api/addressables/register on mount when context-derived address is missing (dev mode + custom-app only; prod refuses).
UI adopters: <Panel> (replaces <PaneHeader>), <Table>, <Navigation> — each ~10 lines on top of the substrate; <Panel> retains the TbHelpHexagon trigger, popover, and click-to-copy address pill.
Phase A — audit /dashboard inventory (count + classify every panel-shaped element so the wrap card can be estimated honestly).
Phase A — wrap every addressable on /dashboard; flip /dashboard to strict mode; verify registry rows + library-seeded help bodies render.
Live address devtool — hover overlay, address pill, copy-to-clipboard, ⌥click toggles.
Gadmin /dev/page-help editor (replaces /dev/pane-help from PLA-0004; same UX, joins through addressables; archive orphaned rows).
PLA-0004 carry-forward — migrate the 5 nav-prefs pane_help rows into page_help keyed by registry UUIDs; drop pane_help table.
Phase B sweep — /preferences/** (already partially adopted; mechanical re-wrap onto new substrate).
Phase B sweep — /dev/** (internal-only; failures don't reach users).
Phase B sweep — /library-releases (cross-tenant visibility; do last).

Lint flip — structural rule (any heading-as-first-child container MUST be <Panel>) + CI gate; default strict; per-page exemption list shrinks as sweep cards land; final story flips the last lenient page and removes the exemption table.
Samantha SDK contract — custom apps register at runtime via the substrate; help defaults try library → SDK manifest → null; documented as a hard rule.
Docs — docs/c_c_addressables.md leaf doc + CLAUDE.md pointer + c_scope.md Underway row + PLA-0004 closure note (pane_help architecture superseded; help system now under addressables).
areas_impacted: SQL: three new migrations (074 page_addressables, 075 page_help + library_help_defaults, 076 pane_help drop after backfill).
API: new addressables.Service Go module with hard write boundary; four new REST endpoints; one deprecated endpoint (/api/pane-help bulk and PUT).
UI: new substrate (DomRegistry, AddressContext, ViewportSlot) + three adopters (Panel, Table, Navigation) + every panel-shaped element on every page wrapped.
DEV: live address devtool, lint:addressables (replaces lint:panes), audit script for /dashboard, per-page sweep cards.
GOV: gadmin /dev/page-help editor (rename + new backend) replaces /dev/pane-help.

SEC: trust-no-one boundary at addressables.Service — direct INSERTs into page_addressables outside the service are forbidden; reconcile endpoint requires CI service-account auth; runtime register endpoint gated by NODE_ENV !== 'production' OR custom-app auth.
DOC: new leaf doc, CLAUDE.md pointer, c_scope.md row, PLA-0004 closure note.
feature_list: page_addressables table — UUID PK, parent self-FK, unique sibling triple, soft-archive, source enum, last_seen_at GC marker.
page_help table keyed by addressable_id UUID + library_help_defaults table for canonical help copy keyed by (kind, name_pattern).
addressables.Service Go module — RegisterFromBuild / RegisterFromRuntime / Snapshot / library lookup; sole writer.
REST surface — build-reconcile (CI-only), register (dev/custom-app only), snapshot (read), page-help by addressable_id.
DomRegistry + AddressContext + useRegisterAddressable + <ViewportSlot> substrate (six viewport slots: app | header | footer | side_bar | modal | toast).
<Panel> (replaces <PaneHeader>), <Table>, <Navigation> adopters; <Panel> keeps TbHelpHexagon + popover + click-to-copy address pill.
/dashboard fully adopted (Phase A proving ground), strict mode on.
Live address devtool — hover overlay + address pill + copy-to-clipboard.
lint:addressables — structural rule + CI gate; per-page exemption list.
Samantha SDK help-manifest contract; addresses inherited from host context.
features_extended: PLA-0004 extends: <PaneHeader> generalises into <Panel> as the first kind on a wider addressable substrate; help system migrates from string paneId → UUID FK.
PLA-0004 extends: /dev/pane-help editor renames to /dev/page-help with the same UX but a new backend join through addressables.
PLA-0004 extends: lint:panes upgrades into lint:addressables with structural rules and a strict-by-default CI gate.
features_removed: pane_help table (string PK) — superseded by page_help (UUID FK); rows migrated forward then table dropped.
GET /api/pane-help bulk endpoint and PUT /api/pane-help/:paneId — replaced by GET /api/page-help/:addressable_id and the gadmin editor's writes through the same service.
Hand-maintained dev/registries/paneIds.json — replaced by the DB-backed registry + GET /api/addressables/snapshot.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: db/schema/074_page_addressables.sql creates page_addressables with id uuid PK, parent_id uuid self-FK nullable, kind text NOT NULL, name text NOT NULL, address text NOT NULL, source text CHECK in ('build','runtime','custom_app'), custom_app_id uuid nullable, soft_archived bool default false, last_seen_at timestamptz, created_at + updated_at
Unique constraint enforces (parent_id, kind, name) with WHERE soft_archived=false; partial index on address for fast snapshot reads; index on (page_route, soft_archived)
Migration runs cleanly against dev DB; SELECT count(*) FROM page_addressables returns 0; constraint violations on duplicate sibling triples return 23505

db/schema/075_page_help.sql creates page_help (id uuid PK, addressable_id uuid FK ON DELETE RESTRICT, body_html, locale default 'en', seeded_from, library_ref uuid, soft_archived, updated_at, updated_by) with unique (addressable_id, locale) WHERE soft_archived=false

Same migration creates library_help_defaults (id uuid PK, kind text, name_pattern text, body_html text, locale default 'en') and seeds default rows for kind in ('panel','table','navigation') with generic placeholder bodies

addressables.Service Go module exposes RegisterFromBuild(pageRoute, configTree), RegisterFromRuntime(pageRoute, parentAddress, kind, name, source, customAppId), Snapshot(pageRoute), all returning canonical address strings; library-default lookup runs inside RegisterFrom* and inserts page_help row with seeded_from='library' on conflict do nothing
Service is the ONLY package that issues INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE against page_addressables or page_help — verified by grep for SQL strings touching these tables outside backend/internal/addressables/
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: ripgrep + Go test that asserts package boundary

acceptance_criteria.criterion: POST /api/addressables/build-reconcile accepts JSON tree, requires CI service-account auth (X-CI-Token header), reconciles in one transaction (insert new, soft-archive missing, bump last_seen_at on matched), returns counts {inserted,archived,unchanged}

POST /api/addressables/register requires NODE_ENV !== 'production' OR valid custom-app token; returns 403 in production without custom-app auth; returns 200 with {id, address} on success; idempotent on (parent_id, kind, name) collisions where source='build' (returns existing build row, refuses to overwrite)
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: integration test (3 cases: dev, prod-no-token, prod-with-token)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /api/addressables/snapshot?route=/dashboard returns full addressable tree (depth-first) with address strings; GET /api/page-help/:addressable_id returns body_html (locale=en); 404 for unknown addressable; lazy-seeds page_help row from library_help_defaults if matching pattern exists
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: integration test (4 cases: known route, unknown route, known addressable, unknown addressable + matching library default)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: DomRegistryProvider mounts an in-memory registry seeded from /api/addressables/snapshot for the current route on first render; useRegisterAddressable({kind, name}) reads parent address from AddressContext, returns {address, addressable_id}, calls register endpoint when context-derived address is missing in registry

<ViewportSlot kind='app|header|footer|side_bar|modal|toast'> seeds AddressContext with samantha._viewport.<slot>; TypeScript union type rejects any other value at compile time; sibling collisions (two addressables with same parent+kind+name) throw in dev mode and emit a console.error in prod with samantha._collision.<address> fallback

<Panel name=…> renders with default border + padding from CSS catalog, registers addressable via useRegisterAddressable({kind:'panel', name}), shows TbHelpHexagon button top-right, opens popover on click with address pill (click-to-copy) + body_html fetched from /api/page-help/:addressable_id; ESC + outside-click dismiss
<Table name=…> and <Navigation name=…> register their respective kinds via the same hook, expose composition slots, do NOT render a help button (kind metadata helpable=false in library)

dev/reports/dashboard_panel_audit.md is generated by `npm run audit:dashboard` and lists every <h1>/<h2>/<h3>-as-first-child element on /dashboard with file path, line number, classification (panel/info/heading/chart-without-frame), and proposed name segment
Audit count is recorded in PLA-0005 (this plan) so story 00251's estimate is grounded in real numbers; if count > 30, story 00251 is split before card creation

Every panel-shaped element on /dashboard is wrapped in <Panel name=…> (or <Table>/<Navigation> where appropriate); /dashboard's page config sets mode='strict'; build-reconcile run produces N inserts (N = audit count), 0 archives

Every wrapped panel on /dashboard shows the help hexagon top-right; clicking each opens a popover with a distinct address (samantha._viewport.app._panel.<name>…) and either a library-seeded body or a 'no help yet' placeholder; copy-address pill works
Existing /dashboard functionality (charts render, tables paginate, click handlers fire) is unchanged — no behavioural regression

Live address devtool (toggle via ⌥A) overlays a hover indicator on every registered addressable; hovering reveals an address pill with copy-to-clipboard; ⌥click freezes the overlay so it can be screenshotted
Devtool is gated to NODE_ENV !== 'production' AND user.role === 'gadmin' in production; no overlay in user-facing prod sessions

/dev/page-help lists every page_help row joined to addressables, grouped by page_route; each row shows address, kind, current body preview, library-default badge if seeded_from='library' and never edited, last-updated, last-editor; gadmin-only role gate (403 otherwise)
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: page render against dev DB with seeded data

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Inline editor opens on row click; live HTML preview; Save calls a write through addressables.Service (NOT a bare PUT) that bumps updated_at + updated_by + flips seeded_from to 'gadmin'; Cancel discards; archive button soft-archives the help row (not the addressable)
/dev tab bar replaces 'Pane Help' tab with 'Page Help' (URL /dev?tab=page-help); old /dev?tab=pane-help redirects; saved edits visible on next bulk fetch from any wrapped page

db/schema/076_drop_pane_help.sql first runs an INSERT INTO page_help SELECT … FROM pane_help that maps each existing paneId to its registry UUID (registry rows pre-seeded by build-reconcile against /preferences/navigation), then DROP TABLE pane_help
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: migration runs cleanly; SELECT count(*) FROM page_help WHERE seeded_from='gadmin' returns ≥ 5 (the migrated rows)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: /api/pane-help and /api/pane-help/:paneId return 410 Gone with a Link header pointing to /api/page-help/:addressable_id; backend route registration removed; CLAUDE.md and docs reflect the deprecation

All 5 panels on /preferences/navigation are re-wrapped from <PaneHeader> to <Panel name=…>; build-reconcile produces 0 new inserts on this route (rows already exist post-migration) and 0 archives; the 5 migrated help bodies render unchanged
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: page render + reconcile log + visual diff

acceptance_criteria.criterion: /preferences page config flips from 'lenient' to 'strict'; lint:addressables exemption row removed; CI passes

Every panel/table/nav-shaped element across DevPage, DevPlansPanel, DevReportsPanel, DevResearchPanel, DevPaneHelpPanel, DevShortcutsPanel is wrapped; build-reconcile inserts each as new addressables; help bodies seeded from library or 'no help yet' placeholder
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: reconcile log + visual sweep of /dev/* tabs

acceptance_criteria.criterion: /dev page config flips to strict; lint exemption removed; CI passes
Every addressable on /portfolio-settings and /portfolio-model is wrapped; reconcile inserts new rows; help bodies render; both pages flip to strict; lint exemption rows removed
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: reconcile log + visual sweep + CI run

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Every addressable on /work-items and /backlog is wrapped; reconcile inserts new rows; help bodies render; both pages flip to strict; lint exemption rows removed; no behavioural regression on drag-and-drop or filters
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: reconcile log + visual sweep + DnD smoke test + CI run

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Every addressable on /library-releases is wrapped; reconcile inserts new rows; help bodies render; page flips to strict; lint exemption row removed
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: reconcile log + visual sweep + CI run

acceptance_criteria.criterion: lint:addressables npm script runs as a structural AST rule: any element whose first child is a heading element AND that uses border + padding tokens MUST be <Panel> or one of the audited exemption components (<InfoPanel>, <SectionHeading>); rule fails on offending file with line number
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: lint script run on a fixture file with both passing + failing examples

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Pre-commit hook runs lint:addressables; CI workflow includes a separate step that runs it standalone; per-page exemption list is empty (final story removes the last entry); /dev → Reports tab shows a row labelled 'addressables' with last run timestamp + result
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: pre-commit hook + CI workflow + reports tab inspection

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Samantha SDK includes a help-manifest contract: custom apps export an optional helpDefaults: Record<kind:name_pattern, body_html> object; substrate calls RegisterFromRuntime with source='custom_app' + customAppId; library lookup runs first, then SDK manifest, then null body
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: SDK fixture test (custom app mounts inside /dashboard, registers a panel, help body resolved via SDK manifest fallback)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: docs/c_c_addressables.md covers: addressing scheme + _prefix rule, six viewport slots, addressables.Service contract + write-boundary, page_help vs library_help_defaults, /dev/page-help workflow, lint:addressables rule, Samantha SDK contract, PLA-0004 closure note
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: file existence + librarian dry-run reports clean

acceptance_criteria.criterion: .claude/CLAUDE.md gains one-line pointer to docs/c_c_addressables.md per the Authoring rule; PLA-0004 closure entry in c_scope.md notes that pane_help is superseded; PLA-0005 row added to docs/c_plan_index.md

risks.risk: Backfill blast radius — wrapping every panel on every page risks visual regression across the whole product
risks.mitigation: Phase A proves on /dashboard alone behind a build flag; Phase B sweeps run one cluster per card with screenshot-diff verification before strict-mode flip; lenient mode default during sweep allows mixed-state pages

risks.risk: DB write-boundary leak — anyone bypassing addressables.Service to INSERT page_addressables corrupts the registry irreversibly
risks.mitigation: ripgrep test in CI fails any file outside backend/internal/addressables/ that contains 'page_addressables' in a SQL context; trust-no-one checklist updated; service has a single write transaction wrapper

risks.risk: Custom-app collision — third-party app registers a name that conflicts with a build-declared addressable
risks.mitigation: Build wins: register endpoint refuses to overwrite source='build' rows; custom-app authors must rename; collision returns 409 with the existing canonical address so the app can adapt

risks.risk: Snapshot fetch latency on first page load — every wrapped page calls /api/addressables/snapshot before any addressable mounts
risks.mitigation: Server-side cache with ETag (route + last_seen_at_max as cache key); snapshot embedded in initial HTML for SSR; client falls back to API call on cache miss; soft target < 50ms p95

risks.risk: Help-body library churn — updating a library default silently changes help text for every lazy-seeded page
risks.mitigation: Lazy seed materializes the library body into page_help on first fetch (snapshot-in-time); subsequent library updates do NOT auto-propagate; gadmin can opt-in to 're-seed from library' per row in /dev/page-help

risks.risk: Locale column unused on day one creates dead complexity
risks.mitigation: Cheap insurance — single column, default 'en', no UI; removing later costs a migration, adding later costs the same migration plus a backfill

risks.risk: Address devtool overlay leaks into production screenshots
risks.mitigation: Hard-gated NODE_ENV !== 'production' AND user.role === 'gadmin' in production; off by default; ⌥A toggle is the only entry point

risks.risk: PLA-0004 work just shipped (5 nav-prefs panels) gets re-done in this plan
risks.mitigation: PLA-0004 is the proof of concept — this plan extends it, doesn't replace it. The 5 panels get migrated forward (story 00254) not rewritten; <PaneHeader> is renamed to <Panel> in one PR

open_decisions_locked: Address scheme: samantha._viewport.<slot>._kind.name[._kind.name…] with leading underscore on every system segment (self-tokenizing).
Six viewport slots: app | header | footer | side_bar | modal | toast.
No _pageID — addresses are page-scoped by mount location; custom apps inherit address from host context.
Sibling collision rule: lint blocks duplicate (parent, kind, name) triples; runtime registry rejects with 409.
Orphan rendering: subtrees outside any <ViewportSlot> render under samantha._orphan.… with dev-console warning (visible, not crashing).
Source of truth: page_addressables Postgres table; build-time reconcile + runtime register; no page.config.ts files.
Sole writer: addressables.Service Go module; CI lint blocks direct table writes from anywhere else.
Build wins on conflict: runtime register refuses to overwrite source='build' rows.
Soft-archive on disappearance: rows stay for audit; help bodies survive panel re-add.
Dev-mode auto-register: enabled (NODE_ENV !== 'production' OR custom-app auth); prod refuses unauthenticated registers.
Custom apps as first-class: app_id partition column; same app embedded in two pages keeps one canonical sub-tree.
Help table: page_help keyed by addressable_id UUID, NOT by string paneId.
FK behaviour: ON DELETE RESTRICT + soft_archive on both sides; preserves gadmin-edited bodies if a panel is re-added.
Lazy library seed: register-time auto-seed AND read-time fallback both populate page_help; library churn does NOT silently propagate after first seed.
Locale column from day one: default 'en', no UI surface yet.
Custom-app help: hybrid — library_help_defaults first, then SDK manifest, then null body.
Adoption order: Dashboard (Phase A) → preferences → dev → portfolio → work-items+backlog → library-releases (Phase B clusters).

references.label: PLA-0004 — pane help system (parent plan; this plan extends and supersedes the architecture)
Existing pane_help table + service (migrated forward then dropped)
Trust-No-One security checklist — addressables.Service write boundary
Dev Plans tab (where this plan renders for review)
